business_question: Which customer segments generate the highest average order value?
business_context: Marketing teams want to focus acquisition efforts on high-value customer groups.
sql_answer:
SELECT
c.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT,
SUM(s.NET_UNITS_SOLD) AS TOTAL_SALES,
COUNT(DISTINCT s.ORDER_ID) AS TOTAL_ORDERS,
ROUND(
SUM(s.NET_UNITS_SOLD) /
NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT s.ORDER_ID),0),
2
) AS AVG_ORDER_VALUE
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN DIM_CUSTOMER c
ON s.CUSTOMER_KEY = c.CUSTOMER_KEY
GROUP BY c.CUSTOMER_SEGMENT
ORDER BY AVG_ORDER_VALUE DESC;
